ense":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://87b3541437c8c443ccd36795e56a338ed12855eec17f8da624511b8d1a7e14df","dweb:/ipfs/QmeJQCtZrQjtJLr6u7ZHWeH3pBnjtLWzvRrKViAi7UZqxL"]},"project:/contracts/MediSecureAccessControl.sol":{"keccak256":"0xe67049698e923809441a6a547a7ab450b3aaa3ebc0db082691d934736d659396","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://905b335226316f4476615893d68fde6b197d57057c4ad2d532b60edb2c0c2731","dweb:/ipfs/QmRrtQREL6hi7gtB37MpVeeTdK7cCRVpnRAFxQyceVkxno"]}},"version":1}

deployedGeneratedSources.name: #utility.yul

documentation.text:
@title Roles
 @dev Role definitions for the MediSecure platform

@title MediSecureAccessControl
 @dev Centralized access control contract with role-based permissions
@dev Maps Roles enum to AccessControl bytes32 hashes

@dev Grant admin role to an address
 @param account Address to grant role to

@dev Grant doctor role to an address
 @param account Address to grant role to

@dev Grant patient role to an address
 @param account Address to grant role to

@dev Grant hospital role to an address
 @param account Address to grant role to

@dev Grant insurance provider role to an address
 @param account Address to grant role to

@dev Grant marketplace company role to an address
 @param account Address to grant role to
@dev Grant governor role to an address
@dev Grant upgrader role to an address
@dev Grant verifier role to an address

devdoc.details: Centralized access control contract with role-based permissions

AccessControlBadConfirmation().details: The caller of a function is not the expected one. NOTE: Don't confuse with {AccessControlUnauthorizedAccount}.

EnforcedPause().details: The operation failed because the contract is paused.

ExpectedPause().details: The operation failed because the contract is not paused.

Paused(address).details: Emitted when the pause is triggered by `account`.

RoleAdminChanged(bytes32,bytes32,bytes32.details: Emitted when `newAdminRole` is set as ``role``'s admin role, replacing `previousAdminRole` `DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE` is the starting admin for all roles, despite {RoleAdminChanged} not being emitted signaling this.

RoleGranted(bytes32,address,address).details: Emitted when `account` is granted `role`. `sender` is the account that originated the contract call, an admin role bearer except when using {AccessControl-_setupRole}.

RoleRevoked(bytes32,address,address).details: Emitted when `account` is revoked `role`. `sender` is the account that originated the contract call:   - if using `revokeRole`, it is the admin role bearer   - if using `renounceRole`, it is the role bearer (i.e. `account`)

Unpaused(address).details: Emitted when the pause is lifted by `account`.

getRoleAdmin(bytes32).details: Returns the admin role that controls `role`. See {grantRole} and {revokeRole}. To change a role's admin, use {_setRoleAdmin}.

getRoleHash(uint8).details: Maps Roles enum to AccessControl bytes32 hashes

grantAdminRole(address).details: Grant admin role to an address

grantCompanyRole(address).details: Grant marketplace company role to an address

grantDoctorRole(address).details: Grant doctor role to an address

grantGovernorRole(address).details: Grant governor role to an address

grantHospitalRole(address).details: Grant hospital role to an address

grantInsuranceRole(address).details: Grant insurance provider role to an address

grantPatientRole(address).details: Grant patient role to an address

grantRole(bytes32,address).details: Grants `role` to `account`. If `account` had not been already granted `role`, emits a {RoleGranted} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleGranted} event.

grantUpgraderRole(address).details: Grant upgrader role to an address

grantVerifierRole(address).details: Grant verifier role to an address

isCompany(address).details: Check if account has company role

returns._0: True if account has company role

isDoctor(address).details: Check if account has doctor role

returns._0: True if account has doctor role

isHospital(address).details: Check if account has hospital role

returns._0: True if account has hospital role

isInsuranceProvider(address).details: Check if account has insurance provider role

returns._0: True if account has insurance provider role

isPatient(address).details: Check if account has patient role

returns._0: True if account has patient role

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

renounceRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from the calling account. Roles are often managed via {grantRole} and {revokeRole}: this function's purpose is to provide a mechanism for accounts to lose their privileges if they are compromised (such as when a trusted device is misplaced). If the calling account had been revoked `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must be `callerConfirmation`. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

revokeRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from `account`. If `account` had been granted `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

devdoc.title: MediSecureAccessControl
